name: Workflow Impact Scoreboard Adapter

source.notes: Strict, evidence-bound comparison records for benchmark and ordinary workflow impact.

capabilities: cost, elapsed-time, token, validation, and regression evidence

inputs: paired or explicitly unpaired run records
immutable artifact locators and SHA-256 identities
outputs: paired pass-rate, elapsed, cost, and token deltas

boundaries: Examples are excluded from measured aggregates by default.
Private or local artifact paths are redacted and never expose host paths.
A fired card is not assumed to have helped.
forbidden_claims: An example entry is measured evidence.
An unpaired run proves Fairy Tale uplift.
Missing cost, elapsed, or token values may be silently estimated.

checks: schema and runtime key sets stay synchronized
sample benchmark and normal-task pairs validate
routing ledger aggregates and card utilization match exactly
example rows stay outside measured aggregates
input/output path aliases fail before writing
